To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will involve basic commands such as initializing a 
repository, adding files, and committing changes.                               

Here is the implementation of minigit in Rust:                                  

main.rs                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@                                                                
+use std::fs;                                                                   
+use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};                                                
+use std::io::{self, Write};                                                    
+                                                                               
+const MINIGIT_DIR: &str = ".minigit";                                          
+const INDEX_FILE: &str = "index";                                              
+                                                                               
+fn main() {                                                                    
+    let args: Vec<String> = std::env::args().collect();                        
+    if args.len() < 2 {                                                        
+        eprintln!("Usage: minigit <command>");                                 
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    match args[1].as_str() {                                                   
+        "init" => init(),                                                      
+        "add" => add(&args[2..]),                                              
+        "commit" => commit(&args[2..]),                                        
+        _ => eprintln!("Unknown command"),                                     
+    }                                                                          
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+fn init() {                                                                    
+    let repo_path = Path::new(MINIGIT_DIR);                                    
+    if repo_path.exists() {                                                    
+        eprintln!("Repository already initialized");                           
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    fs::create_dir(repo_path).expect("Failed to create repository directory"); 
+    fs::File::create(repo_path.join(INDEX_FILE)).expect("Failed to create index
file");                                                                         
+                                                                               
+    println!("Initialized empty minigit repository in .minigit/");             
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+fn add(files: &[String]) {                                                     
+    let repo_path = Path::new(MINIGIT_DIR);                                    
+    if !repo_path.exists() {                                                   
+        eprintln!("Not a minigit repository (missing .minigit directory)");    
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let index_path = repo_path.join(INDEX_FILE);                               
+                                                                               
+    for file in files {                                                        
+        let file_path = Path::new(file);                                       
+        if !file_path.exists() {                                               
+            eprintln!("File not found: {}", file);                             
+            continue;                                                          
+        }                                                                      
+                                                                               
+        let content = fs::read_to_string(&file_path).expect("Failed to read    
file");                                                                         
+        let index_entry = format!("{} {}\n", file, content);                   
+                                                                               
+        fs::write(&index_path, index_entry).expect("Failed to write to index   
file");                                                                         
+                                                                               
+        println!("Added file: {}", file);                                      
+    }                                                                          
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+fn commit(args: &[String]) {                                                   
+    let repo_path = Path::new(MINIGIT_DIR);                                    
+    if !repo_path.exists() {                                                   
+        eprintln!("Not a minigit repository (missing .minigit directory)");    
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let index_path = repo_path.join(INDEX_FILE);                               
+                                                                               
+    if !index_path.exists() {                                                  
+        eprintln!("No changes to commit (index file is empty)");               
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let commit_message: String = args.join(" ");                               
+    if commit_message.is_empty() {                                             
+        eprintln!("Please provide a commit message");                          
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+                                                                               
+    let commit_file = repo_path.join(format!("commit_{}.txt",                  
chrono::Local::now().format("%Y%m%d%H%M%S")));                                  
+    fs::write(&commit_file, format!("Commit: {}\n\n{}", commit_message,        
fs::read_to_string(&index_path).expect("Failed to read index                    
file"))).expect("Failed to write commit file");                                 
+                                                                               
+    println!("Committed changes");                                             
+}                                                                              
                                                                                

Makefile

    cargo build --release                                                       
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:

To run the tests, you can use the following command:                            

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1 @@                                                                   
+bash test-v1.sh                                                                
                                                                                

This implementation provides a basic version of minigit with init, add, and     
commit commands. The repository is stored in a hidden directory .minigit, and   
changes are tracked in an index file. Commits are saved as text files with      
timestamps.
